case_title: XIA YANG RESPONDENT VS. FREDDIE THOMAS PHILIPS III APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-30-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THIS CAUSE WAS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 602 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. JUDGE D. MITCHELL, CLERK I. HAMMER, T. BACKMAN, ESQ. FOR MR. PHILIPS AND MR YANG (IN PRO PER) (WITH INTERPRETER) PRESENT IN COURT. THE COURT, HAVING CONSIDERED THE PLEADINGS, THE EVIDENCE AND HAVING HEARD TESTIMONY FROM BOTH PARTIES TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AFTER MS. BACKMAN MADE A CLOSING ARGUMENT. THE COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT LATER IN THE DAY.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2006 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO PRO TEM FOR THIS CALENDAR. (206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2006 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON DEC-14-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 602. (206)

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT PHILIPS III, FREDDIE THOMAS AS TO RESPONDENT YANG, XIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 817927
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2006 - CONTINUED TO DEC-14-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 MR. YANG TO BRING INTERPRETER TO HEARING. (BOTH SIDES AGREE TO THE CONTINUANCE).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT YANG, XIA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PHILIPS III, FREDDIE THOMAS $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,570.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
